leadText: The Normal Gem (Japanese: ノーマルジュエル Normal Jewel) is a type of held item introduced in Generation V. It is one of the Gems and is the only obtainable Gem in Generation VI onwards.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation V [ edit | edit source ] When held by a Pokémon, it increases the power of the first Normal-type move used by 50%, and is consumed after use. Fling will fail if the user is holding a Normal Gem. Struggle will never consume a Normal Gem. Generation VI onward [ edit | edit source ] When held by a Pokémon, it increases the power of the first Normal-type move used by 30% (approximated as a multiplier of 5325/4096 from Generation V to Pokémon Scarlet and Violet ), and is consumed after use. Normal Gem does not increase the damage or get consumed if the Normal move has its type changed by some effect (e.g. Pixilate , Ion Deluge ).

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 A gem with an ordinary essence. When held, it strengthens the power of a Normal-type move only once. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A gem with an ordinary essence. When held, it strengthens the power of a Normal-type move one time. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of normalcy and will boost the power of a Normal-type move—but only once.
